Trait.name: Psychopath
Trait.label: Psychopath
Trait.description: Lacks empathy and has no remorse for their actions.

Trait.name: Sociopath
Trait.label: Sociopath
Trait.description: Disregards social norms and rules, acting purely according to their own self-interest.

Trait.name: Empath
Trait.label: Empath
Trait.description: Innately attuned to the emotions of others, often feeling their pain and joy as if it were their own.

Trait.name: Narcissist
Trait.label: Narcissist
Trait.description: Possesses an inborn, unshakeable belief in their own superiority over others.

Trait.name: Prodigy
Trait.label: Prodigy
Trait.description: Displayed extraordinary talent in a particular skill from a very young age.

Trait.name: Savant
Trait.label: Savant
Trait.description: Possesses an extraordinary, narrowly-focused talent despite struggling in most other areas.

Trait.name: Slow Learner
Trait.label: Slow Learner
Trait.description: Struggles from birth to grasp new skills and information at a normal pace.

Trait.name: Sixth Sense
Trait.label: Sixth Sense
Trait.description: Has an inborn intuition that warns of danger or hidden truths before they become apparent.

Trait.name: Photographic Memory
Trait.label: Photographic Memory
Trait.description: Born with the ability to recall images and details with near-perfect accuracy.

Trait.name: Kleptomaniac
Trait.label: Kleptomaniac
Trait.description: Feels an uncontrollable, innate urge to steal, regardless of need or risk.

Trait.name: Pyromaniac
Trait.label: Pyromaniac
Trait.description: Feels an innate fascination with fire and an urge to set things ablaze.

Trait.name: Sleepwalker
Trait.label: Sleepwalker
Trait.description: Prone to walking and performing actions while still fully asleep.

Trait.name: Light Sleeper
Trait.label: Light Sleeper
Trait.description: Wakes at the slightest sound or disturbance, rarely achieving deep rest.

Trait.name: Deep Sleeper
Trait.label: Deep Sleeper
Trait.description: Sleeps so soundly that even loud noises or danger rarely wake them.

Trait.name: Quick Reflexes
Trait.label: Quick Reflexes
Trait.description: Born with unusually fast reaction time to sudden events.

Trait.name: Clumsy
Trait.label: Clumsy
Trait.description: Naturally poor coordination leads to frequent stumbles, drops, and accidents.

Trait.name: Green Thumb
Trait.label: Green Thumb
Trait.description: Has an innate talent for nurturing plants, making them grow stronger and faster.

Trait.name: Animal Whisperer
Trait.label: Animal Whisperer
Trait.description: Naturally at ease with animals, easily earning their trust and calm.

Trait.name: Night Owl
Trait.label: Night Owl
Trait.description: Naturally most alert, energetic, and productive during the night.

Trait.name: Early Riser
Trait.label: Early Riser
Trait.description: Naturally most alert, energetic, and productive in the early morning.
